trivia_bullets.text: Back on Track connects the Aetherdrift racing set to Amonkhet's post-Phyrexian lore. The Champions of Amonkhet team (Basri Ket + the resurrected legendary charioteer Zahur) represents Amonkhet in the Grand Prix. Basri discovered Zahur's tomb during expeditions into the Broken Lands and performed rites to resurrect him.
sources: magic.wizards.com: Aetherdrift — Hour of Restoration, via WebSearch

trivia_bullets.text: "At the Tombs Before Time, the living of Amonkhet made vital alliances with the honored dead." The Tombs Before Time is a specific Amonkhet location; Basri's story quest in 'Hour of Restoration' involves recovering the vizier Temmet to restore the god Oketra.
sources: magic.wizards.com: Aetherdrift — Hour of Restoration, via WebSearch

trivia_bullets.text: Back on Track returns any creature or Vehicle directly to the battlefield (not hand) and creates a 1/1 Pilot token that saddles and crews as though its power were 2 greater. At five mana in black this competes with Zombify effects but adds the bonus Pilot. EDHREC rank 18,230. Previewed by CNET on 2025-01-24.
sources: Scryfall: oracle text, edhrec_rank, preview source

trivia_bullets.text: Team cohort flag: The Champions of Amonkhet are the white/black team of the Grand Prix. Back on Track's resurrection effect, Amonkhet desert art, and crocodilian creature all point to this team's thematic identity: death as resource, the honored dead as allies.
sources: magic.wizards.com: All 10 Aetherdrift Racing Teams, via WebSearch

related_cards.name: Zombify
related_cards.note: black sorcery baseline for graveyard-to-battlefield; Back on Track is Zombify plus a Pilot token

related_cards.name: Basri Ket
related_cards.note: Amonkhet planeswalker and Champions of Amonkhet co-captain

related_cards.name: Zahur, Eternal Charioteer
related_cards.note: the other Champions co-captain; likely referenced in this card's scene
